title: Impossibility certificates for common-multiplier-invariant Legendre pairs of length 333

core_fact.statement: 668 = 2^2 * 167 is NOT a sum of two integer squares
core_fact.reason: 167 is prime and 167 = 3 (mod 4) occurs to an odd power

certificate.argument: Value-set-restricted 9-compression: column sums lie in the exact K37-invariant value set V; the compression identity + LP force PAF_atilde(s)+PAF_btilde(s)=-74 (s=1..8), row sums +-1, and squared norm 594; a complete square-sum-pruned exhaustive search over V^9 finds no compressed pair. Verified by a dependency-free standalone verifier and (id8,id12) by CP-SAT/z3.

certificate.argument: Exact CP-SAT decision of the booleanized PAF system returned INFEASIBLE; the deterministic model and verdict are reproducible, but this JSON is not a proof trace.

Value-set-restricted 9-compression: column sums lie in the exact K37-invariant value set V; the compression identity + LP force PAF_atilde(s)+PAF_btilde(s)=-74 (s=1..8), row sums +-1, and squared norm 594; a complete square-sum-pruned exhaustive search over V^9 finds no compressed pair. Verified by a dependency-free standalone verifier and (id8,id12) by CP-SAT/z3.

Row sum R = sum_O |O| x_O (x_O = +/-1) can never equal +/-1: R mod 24 avoids +/-1 for all sign patterns.
certificate.verification: exhaustive modular DP over orbit-size residues

certificate.argument: H reduces onto (Z/37)^*; 37-compression is constant on the 36 nonzero residues, so A~(k)=a~_0-c is an integer and (a~_0-c)^2+(b~_0-d)^2=668 is a sum of two squares = 668 (impossible).
certificate.core_fact: 668 is not a sum of two integer squares
